- `nums[l...p]` **严格** 递增，
- `nums[p...q]` **严格** 递减，
- `nums[q...r]` **严格** 递增。

请你从数组 `nums` 的所有三段式子数组中找出和最大的那个，并返回其 **最大** 和。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**nums = [0,-2,-1,-3,0,2,-1]

**输出：**-4

**解释：**

选择 `l = 1`, `p = 2`, `q = 3`, `r = 5`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[1...2] = [-2, -1]` 严格递增 (`-2 < -1`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[2...3] = [-1, -3]` 严格递减 (`-1 > -3`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[3...5] = [-3, 0, 2]` 严格递增 (`-3 < 0 < 2`)。
- 和 = `(-2) + (-1) + (-3) + 0 + 2 = -4`。

**示例 2:**

**输入:** nums = [1,4,2,7]

**输出:** 14

**解释:**

选择 `l = 0`, `p = 1`, `q = 2`, `r = 3`：

- `nums[l...p] = nums[0...1] = [1, 4]` 严格递增 (`1 < 4`)。
- `nums[p...q] = nums[1...2] = [4, 2]` 严格递减 (`4 > 2`)。
- `nums[q...r] = nums[2...3] = [2, 7]` 严格递增 (`2 < 7`)。
- 和 = `1 + 4 + 2 + 7 = 14`。

 

**提示:**

- `4 <= n = nums.length <= 10e5`
- `-10e9 <= nums[i] <= 10e9`
- 保证至少存在一个三段式子数组。

======
You must strictly follow this signature:
solve

Target language: Ruby

def solve(nums)

  n = nums.length

  # Compute inc array

  inc = Array.new(n, 1)

  (1..n-1).each do |i|

    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]

      inc[i] = inc[i-1] + 1

    end

  end

  # Compute dec array

  dec = Array.new(n, 1)

  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|

    if nums[i] > nums[i+1]

      dec[i] = dec[i+1] + 1

    end

  end

  # Compute inc_start array

  inc_start = Array.new(n, 1)

  (n-2).downto(0) do |i|

    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]

      inc_start[i] = inc_start[i+1] + 1

    end

  end

  # Compute prefix sum

  prefix_sum = Array.new(n+1, 0)

  (0..n-1).each do |i|

    prefix_sum[i+1] = prefix_sum[i] + nums[i]

  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

  (0..n-1).each do |p|

    if inc[p] < 2 || dec[p] < 2

      next

    end

    q = p + dec[p] - 1

    if inc_start[q] < 2

      next

    end

    r = q + inc_start[q] - 1

    if r >= n

      next

    end

    l = p - inc[p] + 1

    sum = prefix_sum[r+1] - prefix_sum[l]

    if sum > max_sum

      max_sum = sum

    end

  end

  max_sum

end

def solve(nums)
  n = nums.length
  prefix = [0]
  nums.each do |num|
    prefix << prefix[-1] + num
  end

  left_inc = Array.new(n)
  left_inc[0] = 0
  for i in 1..n-1
    if nums[i] > nums[i-1]
      left_inc[i] = left_inc[i-1]
    else
      left_inc[i] = i
    end
  end

  inc_end = Array.new(n)
  inc_end[n-1] = n-1
  for i in (n-2).downto(0)
    if nums[i] < nums[i+1]
      inc_end[i] = inc_end[i+1]
    else
      inc_end[i] = i
    end
  end

  dec_end = Array.new(n)
  dec_end[n-1] = n-1
  for i in (n-2).downto(0)
    if nums[i] > nums[i+1]
      dec_end[i] = dec_end[i+1]
    else
      dec_end[i] = i
    end
  end

  max_sum = -Float::INFINITY

  for p in 0..n-1
    q = dec_end[p]
    if q > p
      r = inc_end[q]
      if r > q
        l = left_inc[p]
        current_sum = prefix[r+1] - prefix[l]
        max_sum = [max_sum, current_sum].max
      end
    end
  end

  max_sum
end
